response:
```sql
SELECT SUM(population) AS total_population
FROM world_1.country
JOIN world_1.countrylanguage ON world_1.country.code = world_1.countrylanguage.countrycode
JOIN world_1.city ON world_1.country.code = world_1.city.countrycode
JOIN world_1.district ON world_1.city.districtid = world_1.district.id
WHERE world_1.district.name = 'Gelderland';
```
